name: Cinnamon Sugar Crispies
recipeInstructions: Heat oven to 375°F. For cookies, in a large mixing bowl, combine all cookie ingredients. Beat at low speed, scraping the bowl often, until well mixed, about 2-3 minutes. Shape rounded teaspoons of dough into 1-inch balls. For sugar mixture, in a small bowl, combine sugar and cinnamon. Roll each ball in the sugar mixture. Place cookies about 2 inches apart on greased cookie sheets. Center one pecan half in each cookie. Bake for 10 to 14 minutes, or until edges are lightly browned. Remove immediately. Makes about 3 dozen cookies.
